entryPoints.purpose: MCP stdio JSON-RPC 2.0 server entry point.
responsibilities: Read newline-delimited stdin messages and write newline-delimited stdout responses
Dispatch initialize, tools, resources and prompts methods
Report JSON-RPC parse and method errors

handlers.purpose: Declares and implements the MCP tool, resource and prompt surface.
responsibilities: Lineage, impact, trust, contracts and drift analysis

catalog.purpose: Loads the compile-time embedded component catalog and exposes filtering/lookups.
responsibilities: Filter components by kind or free-text query
Return a full component schema by id

catalog.purpose: Generated frontend component catalog embedded by the MCP binary.
responsibilities: Expose component ids, labels, kinds, availability and summaries
Expose synthesized manifest fields and input/output ports

configuration.purpose: Defines the duckle-mcp binary and target-specific engine feature dependencies.

tests.purpose: Inline unit tests for pipeline-analysis tool helpers.
responsibilities: Structural-risk, PII, lineage impact and diff behavior
